T0004.title: Dropshipping
T0004.definition: A service model in e-commerce fraud where a third party handles order fulfillment on behalf of the original seller, including packaging, logistics, and shipping, often to obscure the source of illicit goods.
T0004.description: A service model in e-commerce fraud where a third party handles order fulfillment on behalf of the original seller, including packaging, logistics, and shipping, often to obscure the source of illicit goods.
